uses: Spiesia grandiflora, which is also known as the Chinese spirea, has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal uses include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In addition, Spiesia grandiflora is used to treat digestive problems and promote wound healing. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential applications.
